title: Set up Reusable workflow for niche healthcare process for each lead
excerpt: I’ve played around with the boards and the templates most of the day today to create a complicated workflow process and I am stuck on how to create a flow that would attach to each Lead. I have Company and Contacts with …

posts.author: Slickerdoodle (Cassie Hale)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’ve played around with the boards and the templates most of the day today to create a complicated workflow process and I am stuck on how to create a flow that would attach to each Lead. I have Company and Contacts with who these leads are referred to me and who the contacts are at these companies. The system wants to create leads into contacts, which is not what I want to do. I’d like to keep the leads as leads, and as they go through the customer journey, be automatically placed in Working, Closed, Open etc. And with each of these leads, I’d like to have an attached workflow that goes with each one. I’ve created the types of leads, Outside, Referred and Inside. But I cannot attached these and I’d like someone to help me that knows what they are doing becuase this would be the exact thing that I need for my company. Thanks

Seeking To Hire to complete this task.

Automate leads processes based on events completed.

Connect appropriate company to leads.

Move leads through sales journey.

posts.author: peta (Peta Bolger)

posts.author: Ricky.Tomer (Ricky Tomer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there @Slickerdoodle and welcome to the monday.com community forums!

What you are looking to create is actually something the team at CarbonWeb has worked on extensively. Our team has produced an end-to-end solution with many of the capabilities and features that you discuss in your post. This CRM Suite is designed to be scalable so that you can continuously grow your environment around it while integrating additional tools.
